requirement_topic.en: LEC Grid Connection for BESS — 60 Hz System, LERC Licensing, and Project-Specific Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: LEC BESS并网——60 Hz系统、LERC许可及项目专属并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: LEC BESS併網——60 Hz系統、LERC許可及項目專屬併網要求

summary.en: The Liberia Electricity Corporation (LEC) is the primary national utility responsible for electricity generation, transmission, and distribution in Liberia. The Liberia Electricity Regulatory Commission (LERC), established under the Electricity Law of Liberia 2015, is the independent regulator with licensing authority over electricity generation, transmission, distribution, and supply activities, including grid-connected BESS. All grid-connected BESS installations in Liberia require LERC licensing for project operators and LEC technical approval for grid-connection. Liberia's grid operates at 120/240 V, 60 Hz (US-heritage standard, Americo-Liberian grid tradition) — this is fundamentally different from China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz grid. BESS power conversion systems (PCS) — bidirectional inverters — designed for China's 50 Hz grid must have firmware, protection thresholds, frequency ride-through settings, and anti-islanding parameters fully reconfigured and retested for Liberia's 60 Hz, 120/240 V grid before export, connection, and commissioning. Liberia's grid is fragile and heavily supplemented by off-grid and mini-grid solar systems supported by USAID and World Bank; BESS for mini-grid and off-grid applications must comply with donor-project technical specifications (typically IEC 62933 series or IEEE standards). A publicly accessible LEC technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection had not been confirmed as of the dataset date; direct engagement with LEC and LERC at the earliest project stage is essential.
summary.zh: 利比里亚电力公司（LEC）是负责利比里亚发电、输电和配电的主要国家公用事业机构。利比里亚电力监管委员会（LERC）依据2015年《利比里亚电力法》设立，是对发电、输电、配电和供电活动（包括并网BESS）拥有许可权的独立监管机构。利比里亚所有并网BESS装置均须项目运营商取得LERC许可，并获得LEC技术并网批准。利比里亚电网运行参数为120/240 V、60 Hz（美国遗产标准，美裔利比里亚人电网传统）——这与中国220/380 V、50 Hz电网存在根本性差异。为中国50 Hz电网设计的BESS储能变流器（PCS）——双向逆变器——在出口、接入和调试前，须将固件、保护阈值、频率穿越参数和防孤岛参数全面重新配置并针对利比里亚60 Hz、120/240 V电网重新测试。利比里亚电网脆弱，大量依赖USAID和世界银行支持的离网及微电网太阳能系统补充；用于微电网和离网应用的BESS须符合捐助方项目技术规格（通常为IEC 62933系列或IEEE标准）。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认LEC公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格文件；在项目最早阶段直接与LEC和LERC接触至关重要。
summary.zht: 賴比瑞亞電力公司（LEC）是負責賴比瑞亞發電、輸電和配電的主要國家公用事業機構。賴比瑞亞電力監管委員會（LERC）依據2015年《賴比瑞亞電力法》設立，是對發電、輸電、配電和供電活動（包括併網BESS）擁有許可權的獨立監管機構。賴比瑞亞所有併網BESS裝置均須項目運營商取得LERC許可，並獲得LEC技術併網批准。賴比瑞亞電網運行參數為120/240 V、60 Hz（美國遺產標準，美裔賴比瑞亞人電網傳統）——這與中國220/380 V、50 Hz電網存在根本性差異。為中國50 Hz電網設計的BESS儲能變流器（PCS）——雙向逆變器——在出口、接入和調試前，須將韌體、保護閾值、頻率穿越參數和防孤島參數全面重新配置並針對賴比瑞亞60 Hz、120/240 V電網重新測試。賴比瑞亞電網脆弱，大量依賴USAID和世界銀行支持的離網及微電網太陽能系統補充；用於微電網和離網應用的BESS須符合捐助方項目技術規格（通常為IEC 62933系列或IEEE標準）。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認LEC公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格文件；在項目最早階段直接與LEC和LERC接觸至關重要。

standards_or_laws: Electricity Law of Liberia 2015 — establishes LERC as the independent regulator; licensing required for all generation, transmission, distribution, and supply activities including BESS
LERC — Liberia Electricity Regulatory Commission (licensing authority; verify current BESS-specific licensing requirements directly with LERC)
LEC — Liberia Electricity Corporation (primary utility; grid-connection technical requirements must be obtained directly from LEC)
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected reference in donor-funded project specifications)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected reference in donor-funded project specifications)
Liberia grid standard: 120/240 V, 60 Hz (US-heritage; unconfirmed from a single publicly accessible official LEC technical document — verify directly with LEC)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2017 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) — fundamentally different from Liberia's 120/240 V, 60 Hz. Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not transfer to Liberia and are not accepted by LERC or LEC. PCS firmware and all 50 Hz-based protection parameters must be fully replaced and retested for 60 Hz Liberian grid conditions before any export or commissioning.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2017（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）——与利比里亚120/240 V、60 Hz存在根本差异。中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不可转用于利比里亚，不被LERC或LEC接受。PCS固件和所有基于50 Hz的保护参数须在任何出口或调试前针对60 Hz利比里亚电网条件全面更换并重新测试。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2017（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）——與賴比瑞亞120/240 V、60 Hz存在根本差異。中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不可轉用於賴比瑞亞，不被LERC或LEC接受。PCS韌體和所有基於50 Hz的保護參數須在任何出口或調試前針對60 Hz賴比瑞亞電網條件全面更換並重新測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2017 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Critical gap: Liberia operates a 120/240 V, 60 Hz grid (US-heritage). China's BESS PCS products are designed, validated, and certified for 220/380 V, 50 Hz. This is not a minor parameter adjustment — the frequency difference (50 Hz vs 60 Hz) and voltage difference (220/380 V vs 120/240 V) require: (a) PCS firmware replacement or full reconfiguration of frequency control loops, anti-islanding detection, under/over-frequency protection thresholds, and reactive power response curves for 60 Hz operation; (b) voltage protection relay setpoints recalibrated for 120/240 V; (c) transformer selection or tap settings adjusted for 120/240 V LEC distribution; (d) independent 60 Hz performance testing and validation — Chinese 50 Hz type-test certificates do not extend to 60 Hz operation. Additionally: (e) LERC licensing must be obtained for project operators before operation; (f) LEC grid-connection approval must be obtained for grid-tied installations — engage LEC at the earliest project stage; (g) donor-project specifications (USAID, World Bank, IFC) typically reference IEC 62933 series or IEEE standards — Chinese GB/T is not accepted as equivalent; (h) for off-grid and mini-grid deployments, confirm donor technical specifications before equipment procurement; (i) NSL BESS-specific mandatory scope is unconfirmed — verify directly with NSL.
gap.zh: 关键差距：利比里亚采用120/240 V、60 Hz电网（美国遗产）。中国BESS储能变流器产品针对220/380 V、50 Hz进行设计、验证和认证。这不是微小参数调整——频率差异（50 Hz对60 Hz）和电压差异（220/380 V对120/240 V）要求：（a）PCS固件更换或全面重新配置频率控制回路、防孤岛检测、欠/过频率保护阈值及无功功率响应曲线以适应60 Hz运行；（b）电压保护继电器整定值重新校准至120/240 V；（c）变压器选择或分接头设置调整以适应120/240 V LEC配电；（d）独立60 Hz性能测试和验证——中国50 Hz型式试验证书不延伸至60 Hz运行。此外：（e）项目运营商在运营前须取得LERC许可；（f）并网装置须取得LEC并网批准——在项目最早阶段与LEC接触；（g）捐助方项目规格（USAID、世界银行、IFC）通常引用IEC 62933系列或IEEE标准——中国GB/T不被接受为等效依据；（h）对于离网和微电网部署，在设备采购前确认捐助方技术规格；（i）NSL BESS专项强制范围未经确认——直接向NSL核实。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：賴比瑞亞採用120/240 V、60 Hz電網（美國遺產）。中國BESS儲能變流器產品針對220/380 V、50 Hz進行設計、驗證和認證。這不是微小參數調整——頻率差異（50 Hz對60 Hz）和電壓差異（220/380 V對120/240 V）要求：（a）PCS韌體更換或全面重新配置頻率控制回路、防孤島檢測、欠/過頻率保護閾值及無功功率響應曲線以適應60 Hz運行；（b）電壓保護繼電器整定值重新校準至120/240 V；（c）變壓器選擇或分接頭設置調整以適應120/240 V LEC配電；（d）獨立60 Hz性能測試和驗證——中國50 Hz型式試驗證書不延伸至60 Hz運行。此外：（e）項目運營商在運營前須取得LERC許可；（f）併網裝置須取得LEC併網批准——在項目最早階段與LEC接觸；（g）捐助方項目規格（USAID、世界銀行、IFC）通常引用IEC 62933系列或IEEE標準——中國GB/T不被接受為等效依據；（h）對於離網和微電網部署，在設備採購前確認捐助方技術規格；（i）NSL BESS專項強制範圍未經確認——直接向NSL核實。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — LERC licensing is required for all electricity generation, storage, and supply activities in Liberia; LEC grid-connection approval is required for grid-tied BESS; 60 Hz PCS reconfiguration is a technical prerequisite for any Liberia deployment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Liberia; 50 Hz-based certificates do not extend to 60 Hz operation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy Liberia's LERC licensing or LEC grid-connection requirements. The 60 Hz / 120/240 V grid difference is a fundamental technical barrier: all PCS firmware, protection parameters, and voltage settings must be fully reconfigured and independently tested for Liberia's 60 Hz grid before export or commissioning — Chinese 50 Hz type-test certificates do not extend to Liberia. Engage LERC and LEC at the earliest project stage to determine licensing obligations, connection agreement technical requirements, and applicable IEC 62933 or IEEE evidence requirements. For donor-funded projects (USAID, World Bank), confirm technical specifications directly with the project owner before equipment procurement.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足利比里亚LERC许可或LEC并网要求。60 Hz / 120/240 V电网差异是根本性技术障碍：出口或调试前，所有PCS固件、保护参数和电压设置须针对利比里亚60 Hz电网全面重新配置并独立测试——中国50 Hz型式试验证书不延伸至利比里亚。在项目最早阶段与LERC和LEC接触，确定许可义务、并网协议技术要求及适用IEC 62933或IEEE证据要求。对于捐助方资助项目（USAID、世界银行），在设备采购前直接向项目业主确认技术规格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足賴比瑞亞LERC許可或LEC併網要求。60 Hz / 120/240 V電網差異是根本性技術障礙：出口或調試前，所有PCS韌體、保護參數和電壓設置須針對賴比瑞亞60 Hz電網全面重新配置並獨立測試——中國50 Hz型式試驗證書不延伸至賴比瑞亞。在項目最早階段與LERC和LEC接觸，確定許可義務、併網協議技術要求及適用IEC 62933或IEEE證據要求。對於捐助方資助項目（USAID、世界銀行），在設備採購前直接向項目業主確認技術規格。
